name: Claude Opus 4.8
description: Anthropic's most capable model; strong reasoning, agentic coding, and long-context synthesis.

attributes.intended_use: Complex multi-step agentic tasks, large-codebase reasoning, and high-stakes synthesis where quality matters more than cost.
attributes.limitations: Higher per-token cost than Sonnet/Haiku; overkill for simple classification or extraction. Knowledge cutoff applies.
